subcodes.first_line: O Varqa! Thy Lord maketh mention of thee, that thou mayest make mention of His servants and give them glad-tidings of My mercy which hath preceded all else. Verily thy Lord is the Commander [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقاء ان مولاک یذکرک لتذکر العباد و تبشرهم برحمتی التی سبقت ان ربک لهو الامر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
